title: NOAA Weather Verification — Storm Events Database Query

metadata.data_source: NOAA NCEI Storm Events Database (synthetic facsimile for claim verification)

events.narrative: Severe thunderstorm produced hail to 1.5 inches diameter across northern Plano, including ZIP 75024. Multiple reports of vehicle and roof damage in the Oak Ridge / Custer Ridge corridor. Public reports submitted via Skywarn between 16:48 and 17:30 CDT.

match_summary.notes: No qualifying hail event recorded in ZIP 75024 (or within 5 mi) on 2026-04-22, the reported date of loss. The nearest qualifying hail event was 2026-04-19, three days earlier. Recommend confirming date of loss with insured before proceeding with coverage determination.
